name: Even (HMBradley) Financial Wellness API
what_it_does: Even financial wellness REST API for employer-sponsored earned wage access, budgeting, and financial health programs. Enables AI agents to manage earned wage access disbursement to employee-linked bank accounts for payroll integration, handle OK-to-spend budgeting and cash flow forecasting for employee financial wellness, access automatic savings and goal-setting workflow for financial health automation, retrieve payroll integration data for salary and hours worked verification, manage employer financial wellness program enrollment and engagement, access financial health score and risk indicator data for employer benefit analytics, handle direct deposit split configuration for savings automation, retrieve spending analytics and financial behavior insights for wellness program optimization, manage push notification and engagement workflow for financial coaching, and integrate Even financial wellness with ADP, Gusto, and Workday payroll platforms.
use_cases: Enabling earned wage access from employer benefit agents
Providing financial wellness coaching from HR benefit agents
Automating savings goals from employee financial health agents
Integrating EWA with payroll from Gusto/ADP integration agents
not_for: Consumer banking without employer payroll integration context
High-income fully-banked employees without financial wellness need
B2B payments without employee financial wellness focus
best_when: An employer or benefits platform wants AI agents to deliver earned wage access, budgeting tools, and financial coaching to hourly and shift workers integrated with existing payroll systems.
avoid_when: REGULATORY RISK: Even/HMBradley EWA product is subject to evolving state EWA regulations — California DFPI, Connecticut, and other states have proposed or enacted EWA licensing requirements. Automated EWA disbursement without compliance framework creates regulatory exposure. Even was acquired by HMBradley (2022); product direction and API stability uncertain during integration. Payroll integration accuracy is critical — incorrect hours/earnings data creates EWA disbursement errors.

auth.notes: Even uses OAuth 2.0. Employer partner credentials required. Webhooks for EWA events. REST API with JSON. Even acquired by HMBradley (2022). San Francisco HQ (Even); HMBradley is a fintech bank. Even founded 2014, focused on employer financial wellness. Walmart partnership (2017-2022) was key distribution. Post-acquisition direction toward HMBradley integrated financial product. 500K+ users historically. Competes with PayActiv, DailyPay, and Branch for employer EWA market.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier — employer program fee
pricing.notes: San Francisco. Even founded 2014. Acquired by HMBradley 2022. HMBradley is an FDIC-insured bank. Walmart was flagship Even customer. Post-acquisition integration ongoing. 500K+ employee users historically. Competes with PayActiv (largest EWA), DailyPay (largest standalone), and Branch for employer financial wellness.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per employer integration; documented per partner

known_agent_gotchas: REGULATORY RISK: EWA regulations rapidly evolving — California DFPI, Connecticut, and other states have EWA-specific requirements; automated EWA without state compliance framework creates regulatory exposure
Acquisition uncertainty — Even acquired by HMBradley (2022); API stability and product roadmap uncertain during integration; verify current API availability with vendor
Payroll accuracy dependency — EWA disbursement calculated from payroll integration data; incorrect hours or earnings creates overpayment risk and reconciliation issues
EWA repayment mechanics — EWA advances are repaid via next payroll deduction; automated advance without payroll deduction confirmation creates bad debt risk
Financial wellness feature scope — OK-to-spend budgeting requires ongoing payroll and bank account transaction data; agent must handle data freshness and stale balance scenarios
agent_readiness.security_notes: Employee financial wellness. SOC2. OAuth2. US. Payroll and employee financial account data.

security_score_components.security_notes: EWA and financial wellness. SOC2. OAuth2. US. Payroll and bank account data.
